candidates.name: HTTP Header Forensics
candidates.pitch: Adds a sidebar panel to Chrome DevTools showing formatted security headers, cache policies, and cookie flags with plain-English explanations. Flags misconfigurations with severity badges. Built as a D
candidates.pain: Debugging CORS, CSP, or cache issues requires manually reading raw headers scattered across devtools.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Accessibility Aura Scan
candidates.pitch: Runs a lightweight axe-core scan on page load, showing a floating overlay of issues grouped by severity. Click-to-jump to affected elements. Integrates with Jira/Linear via webhook for ticket creation
candidates.pain: Teams ship inaccessible UIs because WCAG audits happen too late in the sprint.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: API Deprecation Pulse
candidates.pitch: Scans developer.chrome.com, platformStatus, and major SDK changelogs weekly, storing deprecation alerts. Shows alerts as a dashboard badge when visiting affected documentation. Includes one-click Slac
candidates.pain: Teams miss deprecated API notices buried in changelogs until production incidents occur.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: LocalStorage JSON Editor
candidates.pitch: Provides a structured tree editor for localStorage keys that contain JSON, with syntax highlighting, validation, and undo. Supports nested object editing and key search. Built as a DevTools panel exte
candidates.pain: Editing JSON in localStorage via DevTools raw text is error-prone and time-consuming.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Font Lineage Tracker
candidates.pitch: Identifies web fonts using font-face declarations and Google Fonts API lookups, then displays font names, weights, and fallback stacks in a popup. Adds one-click copy to CSS. Useful for designers and
candidates.pain: Design and branding agencies spend hours identifying fonts on competitor or inspiration sites.
